name: White Castle Turkey Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear the White Castle hamburgers into pieces and place them in a large mixing bowl.
2. Add diced celery and seasonings (ground thyme, ground sage, and coarse ground black pepper) to the bowl.
3. Pour in the chicken broth and toss everything together until well combined.
4. Stuff the cavity of the turkey just before roasting.
5. This stuffing will yield about 9 cups, which is sufficient for a 10-12 pound bird (allowing approximately 3/4 cup stuffing per pound of turkey).
